key_sections.purpose: Create mock implementations for ModuleLoader and EventService dependencies

key_sections.coverage: Module listing with filtering, searching, and sorting capabilities
Module retrieval by ID with null handling and dependent tracking
Getting active, core, and category-filtered modules

patterns_discovered.description: Dedicated factory functions (createMockModuleLoader, createMockEventService, createMockLoadedModule) for creating test doubles with consistent behavior
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces duplication and makes mock creation maintainable

patterns_discovered.description: createMockLoadedModule accepts partial overrides to allow flexible test scenario setup
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables quick creation of various test scenarios without boilerplate

patterns_discovered.description: Tests consistently follow Arrange-Act-Assert pattern with comments
Tests cover individual filter operations (category, status, search) and various sort orders
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures all query combinations work correctly

patterns_discovered.description: Tests include both happy path and error scenarios (not found, exceptions)

gotchas_discovered.description: getModuleDependents mock needs to be setup separately from getModule, easy to forget
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Mock factory should pre-configure common dependent patterns

gotchas_discovered.description: Tests distinguish between 'status' field (active/disabled/error) and enabled boolean, can be confused
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Tests clearly document the difference through naming (isEnabled vs status)

gotchas_discovered.description: Git diff shows truncated output at 37450 chars, some test sections may be incomplete
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Full file should be reviewed to ensure all test sections are properly implemented

approach_outcome.summary: Created comprehensive unit test suite for ModuleLoaderService with 1067 lines of test code

details.tests_created: Minimum 20+ test cases across multiple test groups
coverage_areas: Module listing with all filter/sort combinations
Module retrieval (by ID, with null handling)
Module grouping (active, core, by category, by status)
details.mock_strategy: Full mocking of kernel ModuleLoader and EventService dependencies

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests that verify ModuleLoaderService works correctly with real ModuleLoader implementation
recommendations.rationale: Unit tests only verify mocked behavior; integration tests ensure actual kernel interaction works

recommendations.recommendation: Document the relationship between module 'status' field and 'enabled' boolean in test comments
recommendations.rationale: Prevents confusion when maintaining or extending tests

recommendations.recommendation: Add edge case tests for empty module lists and large module collections
recommendations.rationale: Ensures performance and behavior with boundary conditions

recommendations.recommendation: Extract common beforeEach setup patterns into shared test utilities if tests grow further
recommendations.rationale: Reduces duplication and improves maintainability as test suite expands

recommendations.recommendation: Add test data constants for frequently used module IDs and configurations
recommendations.rationale: Single source of truth for test data, easier to update across tests
